label: Deity preset
description: A preset deity definition used when a faction generates an ideology with fixed or seeded deities.

nameType.label: Name type
nameType.description: DeityNameType object specifying the name and type label for this preset deity.

gender.label: Gender
gender.description: Gender assigned to this deity for pronoun and title selection.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Texture path for the deity icon shown in the ideology editor.
